summary: Sports team signup app with a gold ball announcement, tryouts starting June 1st, and team signup functionality with three open slots.

existing_features.title: Open the sign-up form on the Sign-Up page so players can submit their information. The page currently shows 'No Positions Left' / 'Registration Closed' — replace this with a functional sign-up form that allows submissions as long as slots remain available.

Set the total team sign-up capacity to exactly 3 open slots. Once 3 sign-ups have been submitted, the form should lock and display a 'Team Full' or 'No Slots Remaining' message. The backend must enforce this 3-slot limit and reject submissions that exceed it.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add team signup functionality with three open position slots
